articles.title: Stocks to buy: Nagaraj Shetti recommends Bajaj Auto, Epigral shares to buy in the short-term
articles.description: Indian benchmark indices continued to decline, impacted by rising crude oil prices due to geopolitical tensions. The Nifty 50 fell 0.27%, and the Sensex dropped 0.24%, marking a fourth consecutive session of losses amid concerns over inflation and disappointing earnings from major companies.

articles.title: Two Saudi Oil Tankers Targeted as Houthi Blockade Disrupts Red Sea Shipping
articles.description: Houthi attacks on Saudi oil tankers in the Bab el-Mandeb Strait are disrupting Red Sea shipping and adding fresh upward pressure to global oil prices.

articles.title: Repsol's Q2 profit more than triples on refining strength
articles.description: Spanish energy company Repsol said on Thursday its second-quarter adjusted net profit more than tripled from ​the same period last year, helped by stronger refining margins and ‌higher oil prices.

articles.title: Emmer Capital keeps India allocation intact despite oil price risks, backs private banks
articles.description: Manishi Raychaudhuri, Chief Executive Officer of Emmer Capital Partners, said the recent jump in oil prices poses a challenge for India, one of the world's largest crude importers.

articles.title: Fuel for thought: Will E20 drive consumers to EVs?
articles.description: The government mandated E20—petrol blended with 20 percent ethanol—from April. The rollout has fuelled questions, and the debate has moved from energy independence to consumer rights

articles.title: Rising Tensions: Houthi Strikes on Saudi Oil Tankers Escalate Middle East Conflict
articles.description: The Iranian-aligned Houthis have attacked Saudi oil tankers, aiming to impose a naval blockade on Saudi Arabia and create another chokepoint on global oil supplies. With ongoing confrontations between the U.S. and Iran, rising oil prices are straining economies globally. The U.S.-Iran conflict continues to intensify, affecting oil market stability.

articles.title: Rupee rises 5 paise to 96.48 against U.S. dollar in early trade
articles.description: Rupee rises 5 paise to 96.48 against the dollar amid RBI intervention, despite pressure from investor outflows and oil prices.

articles.title: Sensex and Nifty decline in early trade on surging crude oil prices
articles.description: Sensex and Nifty drop in early trade as rising crude oil prices heighten market tensions amid geopolitical concerns.
